title: Flight 370: Seven Hours of Silence
description: On March 8, 2014, someone in the cockpit of Malaysia Airlines Flight 370 made a deliberate choice that led 239 souls into seven hours of complete silence over the Indian Ocean. Subscribe to the Department archive.

youtube_metadata.shorts_title: Case 370: What Happened During Those Seven Hours of Silence...
youtube_metadata.shorts_caption: Malaysia Airlines Flight 370 vanished from radar, but someone kept flying for seven more hours into the empty ocean. The main wreckage has never been found. Subscribe for more classified cases.

tiktok_metadata.video_caption: Someone made a choice in that cockpit. MH370 flew for 7 hours after vanishing from radar into complete silence. 239 souls, zero answers. #horror #mystery #truecrime #unexplained #aviation

facebook_metadata.reels_caption: Flight 370 flew for seven hours after someone deliberately turned off its transponder. 239 people vanished into complete silence over the Indian Ocean.
